summary: Team research completed: IRR-based substitution approach recommended for proving CanonicalR irreflexivity

artifacts.summary: Axiom-based analysis: demonstrated direct approach fails
IRR/semantic analysis: identified projection barrier, derived H-closure

teammate_results.key_finding: Direct axiom approach fails; GContent(M) subset M is syntactically consistent with all non-IRR axioms
Projection barrier identified; substitution approach using IRR contrapositively is most promising

synthesis.recommended_approach: Substitution-based proof using IRR (Goldblatt/Blackburn-de Rijke-Venema technique)
